lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Ello young thingummywut.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a thingummywut?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: A thingummywut? Where? Where?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Those pesky thingummywuts. They get everywhere. They leave a terrible mess too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err you just called me thingummywut.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: You're a thingummywut? I've never seen one up close before. They said I was mad!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Now you are my proof! There ARE thingummywuts in this tower. Now where can I find a cage big enough to keep you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err I'd better be off really.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Oh ok, have a good time, and watch out for sheep! They're more cunning than they look.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They're right, you are mad.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: That's a pity. I thought maybe they were winding me up.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me what they look like and I'll mash 'em.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Don't be ridiculous. No-one has ever seen one.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: They're invisible, or a myth, or a figment of my imagination. Can't remember which right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Teach me to be a mighty and powerful wizard.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Wizard eh? You don't want any truck with that sort. They're not to be trusted. That's what I've heard anyways.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So aren't you a wizard?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: How dare you? Of course I'm a wizard. Now don't be so cheeky or I'll turn you into a frog.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh I'd better stop talking to you then.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Cheerio then. It was nice chatting to you.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Ello young thingummywut.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Please give me your answer, young thingummywut!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: How can that be? Go check again, silly thingummywut!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Spot on!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Ello young thingummywut.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me like a good thingummywut.
